summary: Solid unit test suite covering core logic, output formats, and config loading with good error handling validation. Well-organized with clear naming, good use of fixtures (make_secret helper, _statuses methods), and proper isolation. Includes workflow structure validation and integration testing via act harness. Weaknesses: CLI main() and argument parsing not directly tested; missing boundary conditions (e.g., exactly on warning window threshold, sorting within same urgency tier, reference date edge cases); limited act test coverage (single fixture scenario); subprocess call to actionlint could be fragile. Would reliably catch regressions in core evaluation and formatting logic but might miss edge cases and CLI integration issues.
